hero.badge: AI Operations System for Tutoring Institutions
hero.subtitle: Question generation, exam assembly, adaptive review, analytics, Q&A, study rooms, mock exams, knowledge graphs — UniMind is the all-in-one AI operations system for tutoring institutions. Your teachers stand in front of the class. We take care of everything behind the scenes. Finance, law, medicine, CPA, grad exams — one platform does it all.
hero.footnote: No credit card required · 14-day full-feature trial · All subjects

培训机构最大的三个隐性成本: The Three Biggest Hidden Costs of Tutoring Institutions
不是房租，不是获客，而是被忽视的教研效率、复习效果和数据盲区。: Not rent. Not acquisition. It's neglected teaching efficiency, review effectiveness, and data blind spots.
一道好题 = 选题材 + 编题干 + 写选项 + 写解析。老师一道题花 30 分: A good question = topic selection + stem writing + options + explanation. 30 minutes per question, a full day per exam.
所有学生刷同一套题。学霸浪费时间在已掌握的知识上，薄弱生在新知识面前无效挣扎。: Every student drills the same set. Top students waste time on what they know; weak students struggle blindly with new material.
月底翻 Excel 才看到正确率。哪个学生在哪个知识点反复出错？不知道。等到发现: You check Excel at month-end for accuracy rates. Which student keeps failing which topic? You don't know — until the exam is over.
AI 出题引擎生成内容，Memorix 算法管理复习节奏，知识工作台呈现学情全貌: AI question generation, smart exam assembly, adaptive review, online Q&A, study rooms, mock exams, knowledge graphs — teachers stand in front of the class. We handle everything else.
ARC 对抗管线 · 生成即用: ARC Adversarial Pipeline · Ready to Use
我们采用多智能体对抗生成架构——Author（出题者）、Reviewer（审题者: Our multi-agent adversarial architecture — Author, Reviewer, and Classifier — iterate on every question. Substandard generations are automatically rejected and retried until the quality score exceeds the threshold. Compared to single LLM calls, the adversarial pipeline boosts question usability from ~60% to 85%+. All question types supported across all subjects.
我们采用多智能体对抗生成架构——Author、Reviewer、Classifi: Our multi-agent adversarial architecture — Author, Reviewer, and Classifier — iterate on every question. Substandard generations are automatically rejected and retried until the quality score exceeds the threshold. Compared to single LLM calls, the adversarial pipeline boosts question usability from ~60% to 85%+. All question types supported across all subjects.
Author → Reviewer → Classifier 三智能体对抗，最多: Author → Reviewer → Classifier adversarial pipeline, up to 3 iterations
全学科全题型，按学术风格生成: All subjects, all question types, discipline-specific style
论文级遗忘建模，在遗忘前精准推送: Research-grade forgetting models, precise review before you forget
Memorix 是我们自研的记忆调度算法。与传统间隔重复不同，它采用 Weibu: Memorix is our proprietary memory scheduling algorithm. Unlike traditional spaced repetition, it models forgetting with a Weibull distribution — more accurately capturing real human memory decay. After each answer, the algorithm updates 20 personalized parameters via online SGD with Nesterov Momentum, calibrated with Brier scores. On our 431 Finance dataset (500+ users, 120K review logs), Memorix reduced prediction RMSE by 13.7% vs FSRS v4.5 and improved knowledge retention by 9.2%.
Memorix 是我们自研的记忆调度算法。采用 Weibull 分布替代幂律模型: Memorix is our proprietary memory scheduling algorithm. It models forgetting with a Weibull distribution — more accurately capturing real human memory decay than traditional power-law models. After each answer, the algorithm updates 20 personalized parameters via online SGD, calibrated with Brier scores. Compared to FSRS v4.5, Memorix reduced prediction RMSE by 13.7% and improved knowledge retention by 9.2%.
Weibull 遗忘建模 — 比传统幂律模型更贴合真实记忆衰减: Weibull forgetting model — more accurate than traditional power-law models
在线 SGD + Nesterov 动量 — 每次作答=一次参数自进化: Online SGD + Nesterov — every answer evolves your memory profile
在线 SGD + Nesterov 动量 — 每次作答 = 一次参数自进化: Online SGD + Nesterov — every answer evolves your memory profile
Brier Score 概率校准 — 让\"遗忘预测\"有数学保证: Brier Score calibration — mathematically guaranteed forgetting predictions
Brier Score 概率校准 — 让遗忘预测有数学保证: Brier Score calibration — mathematically guaranteed forgetting predictions
20 维个性化参数 — 每人独立的记忆画像，而非群体均值: 20-dimension personal parameters — individual memory portrait, not group average
可视化知识图谱，掌握度一目了然: Visual knowledge graph, mastery at a glance
每个知识点以彩色节点呈现在交互式知识图谱上——绿色代表已掌握，红色代表薄弱点，灰: Each knowledge point appears as a colored node on the interactive graph — green for mastered, red for weak, gray for untouched. Click any node to see related questions, mistake records, and course resources. Students see their knowledge structure; teachers pinpoint class weaknesses.
按掌握度着色，薄弱点自动标红: Color-coded by mastery, weak points auto-highlighted
知识点关联题目、错题、课程一键跳转: One-click jump to questions, mistakes, and courses
不需要技术团队，不需要 AI 工程师。注册 → 出题 → 让学生做题。就这三步。: No tech team needed. No AI engineers. Register → Generate → Students practice. That's it.
注册机构账号，选择学科方向。系统预置了考研、考证、语言等 10+ 学科的知识点框: Register your institution, choose a subject. We pre-built frameworks for 10+ disciplines — grad exams, certifications, languages — with custom support.
进入 AI 出题中心，选择知识点和题型，AI 三智能体对抗管线自动生成题目。审核: Enter the AI generation center, pick knowledge points and question types. The three-agent pipeline auto-generates. Review and approve with one click.
学生通过微信链接即可做题，无需下载 App。作答后自动批改，知识工作台实时更新每: Students practice via WeChat link — no app download. Auto-grading after each answer. The knowledge workbench updates every student's mastery map in real time.
不限于任何一个学科: Not Limited to Any One Subject
UniMind 的 AI 引擎本质上是\"如何出一道好题\"的专家——你给它哪个: UniMind's AI engine is an expert at "how to write a good question" — give it any subject's knowledge points, and it generates questions in that discipline's style.
所有方案均包含 14 天免费试用。无需绑定信用卡。: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
前 20 个付费客户锁定早期用户价格，终身不涨价。: First 20 paying customers lock in early-adopter pricing for life.
免费版有什么限制？: What are the limits of the free plan?
免费版支持 30 名学员、每月 50 次 AI 出题。你能完整地体验出题→学生做: The Free plan supports 30 students and 50 AI generations per month. You can experience the full loop — generate → practice → analytics — enough to validate the product with a small class. Upgrade to Solo to remove all limits.
我们采用三智能体对抗机制——一个出题、一个审题、一个分类。质量不达标的题目会自动: We use a three-agent adversarial mechanism — one generates, one reviews, one classifies. Substandard questions are automatically rejected and retried. We recommend your teaching staff do a final review — AI saves 90% of drafting time; the last 10% still needs your professional judgment.
平台本身不限制学科。我们预置了考研专业课（金融/法学/医学/计算机等）、职业资格: The platform is subject-agnostic. We pre-built knowledge frameworks for grad entrance (Finance/Law/Medicine/CS), professional certifications (CPA/CFA/Bar/Teaching), language training (IELTS/TOEFL/CET), and civil service exams. You can also customize your own subjects and knowledge trees.
学生怎么使用？需要下载 App 吗？: How do students use it? Do they need an app?
不需要。学生用微信打开你分享的链接就能做题。我们提供的是 H5/小程序体验，学生: No. Students open a link you share in WeChat and start practicing. We provide an H5/Mini Program experience — zero friction for students.
试用到期后数据还在吗？: What happens to my data after the trial ends?
在。你所有的题目、学生数据、学习记录都会保留。续费后立即恢复访问。不续费的话数据: Everything stays. All your questions, student data, and learning records are preserved. Renew to restore full access. Without renewal, data is read-only — you lose nothing.
可以。月付和年付都支持。年付有 23-33% 的折扣。建议先月付一个月深度体验，: Yes. Both monthly and annual billing are supported. Annual billing includes a 23-33% discount. We recommend starting monthly for a deep trial, then switching to annual once you're confident.
和通用考试工具有什么区别？: How is this different from generic exam tools?
通用考试工具是\"把纸质考试搬到线上\"。UniMind 是\"AI 帮你生产和: Generic exam tools "move paper tests online." UniMind is "AI that produces and optimizes your teaching content" — questions are AI-generated, review is algorithm-personalized, analytics are real-time. We don't solve "how to test" — we solve "how to teach and how to learn."
我是个人教师，适合哪个版本？: I'm an individual teacher. Which plan should I choose?
建议从 Free 版开始。30 个学生、每月 50 次 AI 出题足够日常使用。: Start with the Free plan. 30 students and 50 AI generations per month cover daily needs. Upgrade to Solo (¥299/mo, ¥199/mo annual) when you exceed 30 students or need more generations.
你的机构准备好 AI 化了吗？: Your teachers teach. We handle the rest.
14 天全功能免费试用。不绑卡，不收费。学科不限。看看 AI 能为你的机构省下多: 14-day full-feature free trial. No card, no charge. All subjects. Question generation, exam assembly, review, Q&A, analytics — let AI handle it all, so your teachers can focus on teaching.
了解我们的解决方案如何带来实际成效: See How Our Solution Delivers Real Results
不是 PPT 数据，来自真实机构的实际使用反馈。: Not slideshow numbers — real feedback from real institutions.
从独立教师到连锁品牌: From solo teachers to chain brands
以前一套卷子要教研坐一整天。现在 AI 出题 10 分钟搞定初稿，教研只需做最后: Before, a teaching researcher would spend a full day on one exam. Now AI drafts in 10 minutes — staff just do final review. Student mistake data syncs in real time, so teachers know class weak spots instantly.
某金融考研机构教学总监: Teaching Director, Finance Grad Exam Institution
Memorix 的记忆算法是我们选 UniMind 的关键。同样刷 100 道题: Memorix was the key reason we chose UniMind. Same 100 questions drilled, but students using adaptive review show noticeably higher retention — renewal rates prove it.
以前管理不同学科老师用一个 Excel 到处发。现在 UniMind 分学科权限: We used to manage teachers across disciplines with spreadsheets. Now UniMind handles permissions, question generation, assignments, and analytics — all in one platform.
没有你的学科？自定义知识点树，AI 即刻适配。: Don't see your subject? Customize your knowledge tree — AI adapts instantly.
登录你的 UniMind 账号，继续学习之旅: Log in to your UniMind account and continue learning
